sglang.title: Fix throughput threshold for amd ci test
sglang.author: Fridge003
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
unit-test-backend-1-gpu-amd keeps failling at a throughput test, where the passing threshold is 285. For AMD GPUs 285 is too high, so it needs a different threshold.
Reference: https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/actions/runs/15101932742/job/42444118881?pr=6338

Modifications

Checklist

sglang.title: [Metrics] Add KV events publishing
sglang.author: trevor-m
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This PR helps improve routing and planning capabilities for distributed LLM inference.
If enabled, sglang can now publish events when blocks are added and removed from the radix cache, so that a router can build a representation of the tree state across all nodes and route requests accord

current main branch server will crash when call /stop_profile api. It will raise error like this:

sglang.author: yanbing-j
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

This PR is a follow-up on #2807 and #5150 to update extend/decode attention kernel for CPU. We fuse set_kv_buffer in decode attention, in order to reduce the overhead. We also add correspondig UTs test_extend.py/test_decode.py for extend/decode attention kernels for CPU.

vllm.title: [BugFix] [Vul] Add missing `usedforsecurity=False` in MD5 hashing to enable FIPS
vllm.author: shaoyuyoung
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
A supplement to the previous PR (#17043).
When it comes to MD5 hashing, we might meet the two problems below:

It is an unsafe hashing algorithm, please refer to CWE-327
As a result, when using vLLM (consisting of MD5 hashing without usedforsecurity=False) on FIPS, the program throws ValueError.

So

vllm.title: [BugFix] Fix handling of num_computed_tokens with connector
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
#18001 changed the behaviour subtly and broke some multi-connector cases.
This change ensures we don't call the connector get_num_new_matched_tokens method a second time for a given request after an async load has completed.
Some additional explanation:
For async loading there are kind of two passes

vllm.title: [Frontend] add --quick option for vllm chat/complete
vllm.author: reidliu41
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Add --quick/-q for quick API test

As more and more models are supported, it's useful to quickly test the API after serving.
-q / --quick sends a single message and prints the response.
Exits immediately without entering interactive mode.
Helpful for verifying that the model and API are working prop

vllm.title: [Feature]Add support for models quantized with AutoRound
vllm.author: wenhuach21
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Backgournd
This pr is to support models quantized by AutoRound github paper,
AutoRound delivers significantly higher accuracy at extremely low bit-widths (e.g., 2-bit) and offers broader compatibility across models (LLMs and VLMs), quantization formats, and configurations. You can check out our gith
